creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 224784
patch-with-examples-target

> 1. Looks good. Do you know if the 'test' target is automatically run by any component in the official build system?

I am not aware of any system component that runs 'test' target. I only run it by hand.

> 2. There's no intention to install the examples. I'm okay with removing the option.
> On the other hand, I would like to provide users with an option to build the official examples, if they want to. They can certainly do the configure & build by themselves.

I am attaching another patch with the 'build-examples' target.
Please let me know if this answers your concern.
